mapper.insert: /* oms-master-locationBatch-sql-oracle.xml - mergeLocation */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_LC ( CTKEY , ZNKEY , ZNNM , ARKEY , ARNM , LCKEY , CBMSTARTRNG , CBMCLOSRNG , ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , NAMSAB2BPOCTG , BUSANB2BPOCTG , SEJONGB2BPOCTG , USEYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY , ZNKEY , ZNNM , ARKEY , ARNM , LCKEY , CBMSTARTRNG , CBMCLOSRNG , ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , NAMSAB2BPOCTG , BUSANB2BPOCTG , SEJONGB2BPOCTG , USEYN , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_LC WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} ON CONFLICT (CTKEY, ZNKEY, ARKEY, LCKEY) DO UPDATE SET ZNNM = EXCLUDED.ZNNM , ARNM = EXCLUDED.ARNM , CBMSTARTRNG = EXCLUDED.CBMSTARTRNG , CBMCLOSRNG = EXCLUDED.CBMCLOSRNG , ANSUNGB2BPOCTG = EXCLUDED.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , NAMSAB2BPOCTG = EXCLUDED.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , BUSANB2BPOCTG = EXCLUDED.BUSANB2BPOCTG , SEJONGB2BPOCTG = EXCLUDED.SEJONGB2BPOCTG , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE
